# KVitals

> A lightweight KDE Plasma 6 panel widget that displays live system vitals: CPU, RAM, temperature, battery, power consumption, and network speed.

## Docs

- [Installation](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/installation/)
- [Configuration](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/configuration/)
- [Architecture](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/architecture/)
- [Contributing](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/contributing/)
- [Troubleshooting](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/troubleshooting/)
- [Changelog](https://yassine20011.github.io/kvitals/changelog/)

## Source

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/yassine20011/kvitals)
